title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMOffice
description: An office or place of business from OpenStreetMap tagged with office=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMOffice

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

officeType.description: Property. The OSM office tag classifying the office type. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:office'

operator.description: Property. The name of the organization operating the office.

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
